overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a medieval European-style town. The character traverses cobblestone streets, passes through a covered wooden gate, explores a bustling town square with a prominent clock tower, and ascends to an elevated walkway overlooking the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street approaching wooden town gate

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily down the cobblestone street toward the town gate, passing grass verges and half-timbered houses

notable_agents.action: townsperson in green cloak walking ahead toward the gate

entered.detail: traditional medieval half-timbered building with white plaster and dark wooden beams
tall narrow half-timbered house with overhanging upper floor
large covered wooden archway gate forming the entrance to the inner town
grassy bank with wooden fence separating the street from the building
stone and brick building with tall chimneys visible behind the timber houses

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a cobblestone street lined with traditional half-timbered medieval houses. The street leads toward a large wooden archway gate in the distance. A few townspeople walk ahead in the same direction, and grass verges line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden town gate with hanging pennants

events.description: entering the covered wooden archway gate, transitioning from open street to enclosed passage
exiting the shadowed gate interior back into natural daylight

agents.ego_description: passing through the covered gate structure with wooden ceiling and brick pillars

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing watch near the gate entrance

entered.detail: curved wooden ceiling with exposed beams forming the roof of the gate passage
thick brick pillar supporting the gate structure with ivy growing on surface
matching brick pillar on right side with lantern attached
colorful triangular pennant banners strung across the gate ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered wooden gate structure with brick pillars and a curved wooden ceiling. Colorful pennants hang overhead. The lighting becomes darker and more enclosed before brightening again as the exit approaches. A guard stands watch near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with clock tower and market stalls

events.description: emerging from the covered gate into the open town square with expanded visibility
turning right toward the stone staircase leading to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking through the bustling town square past market stalls and various townspeople

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside wooden market cart with red canopy
townsperson in gray dress walking across the cobblestones

entered.detail: tall ornate clock tower with red and white timber framing and pointed roof
wooden market cart with red and white striped canopy selling goods
tall stone column with lantern on top situated in the square center
elaborate stone building with pointed arches and decorative facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a spacious town square dominated by a tall clock tower with distinctive red timber framing. Market carts and stalls line the cobblestone square, with townspeople milling about. A stone pillar monument stands in the center. The architecture shifts to more elaborate stone and timber buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending between brick buildings

events.description: turning right and beginning to ascend the stone staircase alongside the brick building
reaching the top of the stairs and transitioning to elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone staircase next to a brick townhouse, following a woman in a blue dress

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress ascending the stairs just ahead of Geralt

entered.detail: wide stone steps with worn treads ascending between buildings
red brick building facade with decorative stone trim and ivy
large arched window with colorful stained glass panes in geometric patterns
hanging wooden sign with blue paint and text indicating a shop or inn

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns right and ascends a stone staircase sandwiched between buildings. The right side features a brick townhouse with an ornate stained glass window and hanging wooden sign. A woman in blue walks ahead up the stairs. The open square falls away behind as the elevation increases.

events.description: walking onto elevated overlook with panoramic view of the town square below

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated overlook with stone railing, observing the town square below

notable_agents.action: woman leaning on the stone railing looking out over the town view

entered.detail: low stone wall with curved top serving as safety railing for the overlook
stone paved walkway at upper level connecting buildings
elevated vantage point showing the town square, clock tower, and distant buildings with smoke rising

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on an elevated walkway with a stone railing overlooking the town square below. The clock tower and market area are visible from above, with smoke rising from distant chimneys. A woman stands at the railing enjoying the view as Geralt walks along the overlook.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow medieval street through a fortified gate and up to an elevated vantage point overlooking a bustling town. It begins with Geralt walking along a cobblestone path lined with half-timbered houses and grass verges, moving steadily toward a large wooden archway. As the camera enters the covered gate, the lighting dims beneath a curved wooden ceiling adorned with colorful pennants before brightening again upon exiting. The scene then opens into a wide town square dominated by a tall red-timbered clock tower and crowded market stalls, before turning right to ascend a stone staircase past an ornate brick townhouse. Finally, the camera reaches an elevated walkway with a stone railing, shifting the perspective to a high-angle view of the market area and distant smoking chimneys below.
